name: qavajs-skill
description: Authoritative Claude / Cursor / Windsurf skill for the qavajs BDD test-automation framework. ~270 literal Gherkin step patterns, full config and CLI reference, page-object DSL, and runner-specific guides for Playwright, WebdriverIO, Appium and REST/GraphQL/WebSocket APIs. Installable via npx.
author: Alexander Bychinskiy <bermudas.alexander@gmail.com>
